textByHash.0576917848ca0217a0042a73dd37fd626298d38c: I was watching when you became Grand Champion of the Colosseum. It was truly something to behold.
textByHash.2157a51c3e00ccf1893cda6885c0f5542ae910c0: What brings you over to me today?
textByHash.2209bd037e908247c215676455499df005d319d9: You see, inside the Colosseum you'll earn what's called Glory.
textByHash.2897cbcc049727f61424e56318cc3a3d28c0eaf5: Earn more Glory of course. The more you earn, the better your standing in the city.
textByHash.2b75bfe12b3b38b1535f561c21f3803accc9b355: And reaching Grand Champion status will unlock you the Fortis Salute emote.
textByHash.3218d539dc1a2229e65cea1b12766eeab98816c2: I see you've been trying to conquer the Colosseum, eh?
textByHash.32294fa91a23a06a0830dd6a2c6c1b41bebe4dae: It's simple really, you get Glory from participating in the Colosseum! You'll get more Glory the better you perform.
textByHash.355a1db028024b37af8bc64900137bb621940b69: Reaching Brawler status will give you access to the bank within the Colosseum.
textByHash.364b85a4cee9a84e537345df4776a7551d593b32: Glory will improve your status and reputation around the city. You might even get some rewards.
textByHash.37e8711dddc0f9117942bf48c46fba1c54afc940: Reaching Gladiator status might persuade some of the more shady folk around the city to give you more money for... Let's just say illicit valuables.
textByHash.59e2411abca433c993a8a6f5ebe6ebc162419971: You'll have to figure that out on your journey to becoming a Grand Champion.
textByHash.5de634327b1c1e2b44b9b2fe8254ca56e4639e3b: Reaching Hero status will allow you to travel to the Colosseum via the Ring of Dueling.
textByHash.78347c7286c633d41078285c71fc4b49afdec24a: But of course! People all accross Varlamore will hear of your Glory.
textByHash.79dfe7b2e4a98ce2ccc81c25fc967d48577a2f61: You'll make a name of yourself in no time.
textByHash.7aa797110ad41aed6e5d50e86d890726bca7fd98: You'll get a range of benefits depending on your status.
textByHash.7adc7c71afa25a51c5863e4047f3aa46f5ba31a0: Reaching Challenger status will allow you to respawn in Civitas illa Fortis if you so desire.
textByHash.7caeb914cea5471f2f2889f3c385e06a33ddbcbf: Ha! No. But I do have this fancy armour which is pretty glorious! You may be lucky enough to get some of your own from within the Colosseum.
textByHash.81b8037de6c4874b0e4981ecf51d40ffbb9006e2: You can check your status on that board over there. I keep it up to date.
textByHash.8b9e599906c9d18a496b602c28c55784c26c92a6: Reaching Champion status will grant you free herb patch protection just west of the city.
textByHash.9702133aac32ddf5eb4befd00faa37786466f328: I've become quite fond of keeping an eye on the contenders and sharing news of their progress to those around the city.
textByHash.987115c7df5ff80835dcacc7bef27fb0509a2019: You can check that board over there to see any details of your Glory. I try to update it regularly.
textByHash.ac0929ca8351c132373d22d6fcfecbf17631bced: It seems as though you are still a Rookie to the people of Fortis.
textByHash.ac237a9ecce2c4ba9600bb021a55d1f2db54120f: What would you like changing about it?
textByHash.bdae71c2677c0a4834cf363ec13669af61eba281: The name's Gloria. Nice to meet you.
textByHash.bf039e86257eeb9d07aea4afac825000da9a163d: But of course. What do you wish to know?
textByHash.c4a78a6efc1926be7957d051ac433e4dd621c6d2: Performance is measured by a few things. For example, how many hits you take or how quickly you complete the challenges.
textByHash.cfbdb089cdd0ebb39d40df3b7144a830079645a2: I've not seen you round these parts before.
textByHash.d35a52a810257b9ba373e4c4268c02ca6c4ab9a5: I'm sure I could put in a good word at the palace now that you are a .
textByHash.f5fb83553d2d14f10a2bb757781b341a57de806e: Not a problem. I'll let the palace know right away.
